lines.speaker: Cave goblin miner
lines.text: I nearly got caught in a rockfall earlier!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin miner
lines.text: Still, since humans started coming down here, the proportion of miners killed in rockfalls has fallen dramatically!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin miner
lines.text: It's going well. I find repeatedly hitting a piece of rock very therapeutic.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin miner
lines.text: ...but actually I wasn't working very hard!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin miner
lines.text: We're a bit behind schedule. If you lent us a hand, Mistag would pay you for your work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do you take all this ore?

lines.speaker: Cave goblin miner
lines.text: To the town of Dorgesh-Kaan, deep in the caves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you use bones to build with?

lines.speaker: Cave goblin miner
lines.text: Well, our legends say that on the surface there was a substance called 'wood', which grew out of the ground in towers.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin miner
lines.text: But we cannot get wood here, so we can only build with stone, bone, and iron.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin miner
lines.text: Perhaps not for a mighty adventurer like you, but we think they're terrifying!
